name: Will GEO actually bring traffic, or is it just about visibility?
description: GEO can improve visibility and brand authority, but the main benefit is often appearing in AI answers rather than only driving clicks.

mainEntity.name: Will GEO actually bring traffic, or is it just about visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if your content can be cited by AI answers, it can drive awareness even when users do not click immediately. GEO is often most valuable for brands that want to be recognized as a source in high-trust moments, such as comparison, research, or problem-solving queries. The outcome is usually stronger visibility and authority, not just more traffic.
acceptedAnswer.description: GEO can improve visibility and brand authority, but the main benefit is often appearing in AI answers rather than only driving clicks.
